goals.title: Execute the approved LinkAtlas bootstrap work plan in .omo/plans/link...
goals.objective: Execute the approved LinkAtlas bootstrap work plan in .omo/plans/linkatlas-bootstrap-workplan.md. Deliver a runnable pnpm TypeScript workspace, secure Electron React desktop shell, typed contracts/domain packages, fixture/readiness docs, and captured evidence for lint/typecheck/tests/Electron smoke/security boundaries. Respect docs/DESIGN.md, docs/CODEX_EXECUTION_PLAN.md, AGENTS.md, and preserve existing user changes. Do not implement real SQLite persistence, URL ingestion, Ollama, browser extension, or packaging.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI/build surface: run pnpm install, pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm test:integration, and pnpm test:e2e from /Users/cheng80/Desktop/linkatlas after bootstrap. PASS iff each command exits 0 and outputs are captured.

Security/adversarial surface: run static tests/scans proving BrowserWindow uses nodeIntegration=false, contextIsolation=true, sandbox=true; renderer/domain have no forbidden imports; preload exposes no execute/readFile/writeFile/querySql/raw IPC APIs. PASS iff checks exit 0 and negative fixture/mutation proof shows violations are caught or documented.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C002-security-boundaries.txt; boundary tests and manual smoke confirm renderer/domain/preload constraints

successCriteria.scenario: Real desktop surface: drive the configured Electron smoke command after implementation, preferably pnpm test:e2e -- --grep desktop-smoke or the exact equivalent. PASS iff the app shell launches, displays the smoke API value, renderer has no Node globals, and cleanup receipt shows no Electron/Vite process remains.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C003-desktop-smoke.txt; manual smoke confirms LinkAtlas heading, Version 0.0.0, no process/require globals, file:// renderer, cleanup clean
